steps.title: Use the crossing point
steps.content: For a graphed system of two linear equations, the solution is the point where the two lines cross. The question asks only for the $y$-value of that solution.

steps.title: Read the second coordinate
steps.content: The two lines cross at the grid point $(-2,3)$. In an ordered pair, the $y$-value is the second coordinate. The answer is D.
